steps.title: Use the time claim
steps.content: The statement says hoard discoveries continued into the 2000s. The example must name a discovery year in the 2000s, not merely compare hoards or mention a broader time span.

steps.title: Select the dated example
steps.content: A starts at 1896, C only says one hoard was after another, and D falsely says two older hoards were found after 2000. The table's 2013 entry directly supports the claim. The answer is B.
